landing.agentSystemDesc: Graph-based execution orchestration with fine-grained state management across multiple agent modes.
landing.architectureDesc: Frontend/backend separation designed around sandboxed execution, realtime coordination, and extensibility.
landing.channelsIntegrationsDesc: Native Feishu/Lark integration, extensible multi-channel system, and built-in email notification service.
landing.coreFeaturesDesc: Built around sandboxed execution, engineering-focused agents, and custom extensibility for real workflows.
landing.ctaDescription: Deploy it, plug in your own Skills and MCP servers, and run engineering workflows inside a controlled sandbox.
landing.ctaTitle: Run your engineering agents for real
landing.customSkillsMcpDesc: Bring your own Skills and MCP servers so LambChat can work with your internal tools, rules, and workflows.
landing.documentSupportDesc: Multi-format preview (PDF/Word/Excel/PPT/Markdown), drag & drop upload, and S3/OSS/MinIO cloud storage.
landing.feedbackSystemDesc: Thumbs rating, text comments, session linking, and aggregate run-level feedback statistics.
landing.frontendFeaturesDesc: React 19 + Vite + TailwindCSS. ChatGPT-style UI with dark/light themes, i18n (EN/ZH/JA/KO), and responsive design.
landing.harnessEngineeringAgentDesc: An engineering-first agent mode built for controlled execution and collaboration around real development tasks.
landing.heroDescription: An engineering-focused agent workspace with sandboxed execution, Harness engineering agents, and support for your own Skills and MCP.
landing.mainInterfaceDesc: A workspace tuned for engineering tasks, balancing execution, extensibility, and collaboration.
landing.managementPanelsDesc: A unified admin surface for Skills, MCP, roles, settings, and the integration points your team actually needs.
landing.mcpIntegrationDesc: System and user level MCP integration with encrypted storage, dynamic caching, and support for SSE and HTTP transports.
landing.observabilityDesc: Optional LangSmith tracing, structured logging, health checks, user management, and role-based agent access.
landing.realtimeStorageDesc: Dual-write mechanism (Redis + MongoDB), WebSocket support, auto reconnect, and session sharing.
landing.responsiveDesignDesc: Perfectly optimized for mobile, tablet & desktop
landing.sandboxExecutionDesc: Run agent tasks inside isolated sandboxes with a better balance of execution power, environment isolation, and safety control.
landing.securityAuthDesc: JWT authentication, RBAC roles, bcrypt encryption, OAuth support, and access control designed for sandboxed execution.
landing.skillsSystemDesc: Store, sync, and manage reusable Skills with access control, GitHub sync, and built-in authoring tools.
landing.taskManagementDesc: Concurrency control with task execution queue, cancellation support, heartbeat monitoring, and pub/sub notifications.
landing.webSearchDesc: Rich web search with domain filtering, time range filters, region support, and configurable content size control.
